name: virtual-agent-parent
description: Parent orchestrator for Virtual Agent and Resume Analyzer services

scripts.dev: npx concurrently --kill-others "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:resume-backend" "npm run dev:resume-frontend"
scripts.dev:resume-frontend: cd AI-Resume-Analyzer/frontend && venv\Scripts\python -m streamlit run app.py --server.headless true
scripts.install:all: npx concurrently "npm run install:main-backend" "npm run install:main-frontend" "npm run install:resume-backend" "npm run install:resume-frontend"
scripts.install:resume-backend: cd AI-Resume-Analyzer/backend && (if not exist venv python -m venv venv) && venv\Scripts\pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.install:resume-frontend: cd AI-Resume-Analyzer/frontend && (if not exist venv python -m venv venv) && venv\Scripts\pip install -r requirements.txt
